title: Crispy Thai Stir Fry
description: A quick and delicious stir fry made with fresh vegetables and crispy elements. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add mixed vegetables and stir-fry until tender.
Add crispy fried shallots and stir-fry for an additional 2 minutes.
Add soy sauce, hoisin sauce, sugar, salt, and pepper. Stir-fry for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve hot and garnish with additional crispy fried shallots if desired.
Cook time may vary depending on desired level of crispiness for the fried shallots.
Serve with steamed rice or noodles if desired.
Garnish with fresh Thai basil leaves for a pop of color and flavor.
This recipe is easily customizable to suit your taste preferences.
